judge_reason: Description A describes a yellow illustration of a domed flying saucer with a yellow tail on a green panel, while Description B describes a hand-drawn saucer with a glowing trail against a dark background and includes specific quoted text not mentioned in A.
original_image_tags: A scanned color clipping of a printed advertisement. The ad has a white border with red text and a central green rectangular panel. Inside the panel, a yellow illustration shows a classic domed flying saucer, seen in perspective with a long, streaking yellow tail or beam extending to the right. The ad appears aged, with some yellowing and a small tear or stain on the left edge.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A color photograph of a printed card or flyer titled “FLYING SAUCERS ARE REAL!” showing a stylized flying saucer graphic, the text “READ ‘AFSCA WORLD REPORT’ 12 ISSUES - $3.00,” and “AMALGAMATED FLYING SAUCER CLUBS OF AMERICA” with an address line beneath.*
